full_text:
Ge Hong (Zhichuan) 葛洪 (稚川)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Hong (葛洪), styledZhichuan (稚川), was born in Jurong county, Danyang commandery. A famous Daoist philosopher whose works are extant. Ge Hong was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
